project_type: HTML5 Canvas2D web game - Klondike Solitaire
build_system: Custom Node.js build script (tools/build.mjs) - no external dependencies, no npm
test_framework: Custom Node.js test harness (tests/) - no external test libraries
verification_instructions: 1. Run node tests/selftest.mjs for logic tests. 2. Run node tests/domtest.mjs for DOM/render tests. 3. Run node tools/build.mjs to generate platform zips. 4. Open index.html in browser to verify gameplay.
snapshot_or_generated_files: dist/<platform>/ and dist/<platform>.zip generated by build.mjs - not checked in
setup_instructions: No setup needed - pure vanilla JS with no external dependencies. Node.js v22 available for build/test tooling.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - NO npm, NO CDN, NO external assets. Everything must be programmatically generated. All audio synthesized via Web Audio API. All card graphics drawn on canvas. No external images or fonts beyond system defaults.
contribution_requirements: Single self-contained commit with all game files. DEPLOY.md must document deployment process.
key_patterns: ES modules throughout, Canvas2D rendering, Web Audio API for sound synthesis, pointer events for unified input, localStorage for persistence, data-driven config files
directory_structure: index.html + styles.css at root. src/ has core/ (engine), game/ (solitaire logic), systems/ (meta-game), ui/ (HUD/screens), platform/ (adapters), config/ (data). tools/ has build script. tests/ has test harness.
